tagline: Automatic identity management lets you sync users and groups from your identity provider to Databricks.
what_it_does: Automatic identity management lets you sync users and groups from your identity provider to Databricks. Search for identities in identity federated workspaces and add them to your workspace. Group memberships stay in sync with your identity provider.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Automatic identity management lets you sync users and groups from your identity provider to Databricks.
